ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure category (e.g., food, fuel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure category */,
  "category_group" TEXT /* Group of expenditure categories (e.g., food, housing) */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory within an expenditure category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "household_name" TEXT /* Name of the household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the household */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the household */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the household */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Family size of the household */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household associated with the expenditure */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure category */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of expenditure */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the expenditure occurred */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the expenditure */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Merchant ID where the expenditure was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Retail Transactions, Financial Records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., retail, financial) */,
  "source_format" TEXT /* Format of the data source (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data source (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Parent region ID for hierarchical regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "file_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., survey_type, collection_method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of the metadata (e.g., data quality, data source) */,
  "metadata_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_category" TEXT /* Category of the annotation (e.g., data quality, data source) */,
  "annotation_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "quality_category" TEXT /* Category of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "quality_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the transformation was applied to */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation (e.g., normalization, cleaning) */,
  "transformation_description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date the transformation was applied */,
  "transformation_category" TEXT /* Category of the transformation (e.g., cleaning, normalization) */,
  "transformation_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., Monthly Expenditure Report) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., expenditure, income) */,
  "report_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("data_id")
)
